hero.description: Product Designer with a focus on product strategy, systems thinking, and organizational alignment. Helping teams transform ambiguity into coherent experiences.
hero.portraitAlt: Black and white portrait of Herman Lewandowsky

work.heading: Case Studies
work.updatingLabel: Case in the process of updating

concepts.heading: Concepts
concepts.description: Collected here as a demonstration of exploratory product and interface ideas that are more conceptual from a design point of view.

experience.heading: 10 years of experience
experience.headingAccent: building products, systems, and teams at scale.

projects.title: BI Club
projects.challenge: Turned post-purchase loyalty into a scalable engagement system across rewards, partners, and resident services.

projects.title: Green Supermarket
projects.challenge: Unified store operations into one workflow for tasks, inventory, and product logistics across retail and warehouse teams.

projects.title: Omega Finance
projects.challenge: Shaped a modern banking app experience for a smaller bank competing on clarity, trust, and product quality.

projects.title: Uchi.ru
projects.challenge: Turned learning engagement into a structured retention system through gamified mechanics and behavioral loops.

projects.title: Grabr
projects.challenge: Redesigned the marketplace journey into a clearer commerce flow, improving the funnel toward higher GMV.

expertiseItems.title: Product Strategy
expertiseItems.description: Defining vision, priorities, and product outcomes.

expertiseItems.title: Design Systems
expertiseItems.description: Scaling product quality through systems thinking.

expertiseItems.title: AI Products
expertiseItems.description: Creating intuitive experiences for AI systems.

expertiseItems.title: Cross-functional Leadership
expertiseItems.description: Leading teams across design and product.

expertiseItems.title: Design Operations
expertiseItems.description: Enabling efficient and scalable design execution.

Contact.bodyLine1: Feel free to contact me if having any questions.
Contact.bodyLine2: I'm available for new projects or just for chatting.

Case.orientation: I recommend viewing case studies in landscape orientation.
